title: PB4000 Product Doctrine — v1.0
description: Codified product knowledge for the PORTABOOM™ PB4000 portable boom barrier and variants. This is the authoritative reference for all PB4000 deployment, compliance, and warranty decisions within LIFE OS.

PB4000.name: PORTABOOM™ PB4000
PB4000.tagline: The flagship portable boom barrier for road works and facility access

basic.description: Standard PB4000 for urban and arterial road works

compliance.nsw_tcaws: Required where posted speed >45 km/h and traffic must be stopped. Portable boom barrier — not stop/slow bat.

use_when: Urban road works ≤50 km/h with lane closure
Any site where posted speed >45 km/h and traffic must be stopped
do_not_use_when: Shoulder-only works with no lane closure (cones sufficient)
Highway ≥80 km/h WITHOUT a Truck Mounted Attenuator (use PB4000-TMA variant)

tastrack.description: PB4000 with TASTrack IoT fleet management, digital pre-start, and remote monitoring

additional_specs.data_capabilities: Vehicle counting, usage hours, location history

use_when: Client requires usage data or compliance reporting

tma.description: PB4000 paired with Truck Mounted Attenuator for high-speed highway works

event.description: Event and crowd management configuration with rapid deployment kit

rapid.description: Emergency deployment — pre-rigged, operator-briefed, ready for rapid road closure

MINIBOOM-TZ30.name: MINIBOOM TZ30
MINIBOOM-TZ30.tagline: Sub-20kg smart boom barrier with integrated traffic light. One-person deploy.

use_when: Lower speed zones where full PB4000 is overkill

warranty.claim_process: Lodge via Zoho Desk ticket, category 'Warranty'. TAS reviews within 5 business days.

compliance_references.nsw_tcaws: Traffic Control at Work Sites (NSW) — AS 1742.3
compliance_references.boom_barrier_rule: Posted speed >45 km/h requires portable boom barrier (not stop/slow bat) when traffic must be stopped
compliance_references.as_nzs_3845_2: Road safety barrier systems — Portable barriers
